localized_texts.text: Chao Phraya Tourist Boat Bangkok Hop-On-Hop-Off Sightseeing Boat

Chao Phraya Tourist Boat Co., Ltd. provides the original hop-on-hop-off boat service along Chao Phraya River, Bangkok, Thailand. The service has been established since 2003 by Chao Phraya Express Boat Co., Ltd., the leading public water transportation in Bangkok. Chao Phraya Tourist Boat Co., Ltd. established itself on 15th June, 2012 after separating from Chao Phraya Express Boat. Chao Phraya Tourist Boat runs the hop-on-hop-off boat service between 09.00 - 19.15 hrs from Sathorn Pier to Phra Arthit piers and 08.30 - 18.30 hrs from Phra Arthit piers to Sathorn Pier. Boats depart every 30 minutes from 9 piers, including: Sathorn Pier (BTS Saphan Taksin-S6), ICONSIAM Pier, Ratchawongse Pier, Rajinee Pier, Wat Arun Pier, Tha Chang Pier, Tha Maharaj Pier, Prannok Pier, Phra Arthit Pier. From 16.10 to 17.00 hrs, the route is extended to Asiatique as well.
Explore Bangkok at your own pace with our flexible hop-on-hop-off service.
Admire the breathtaking views of Bangkok's skyline and iconic landmarks as you journey along the Chao Phraya River.
Rest assured knowing that our boats operate with punctuality and efficiency.
Travel in comfort aboard our modern and well-equipped boats, featuring spacious seating areas, shaded decks, and onboard amenities.
Our hop-on-hop-off service in Bangkok lets you easily visit famous places like Wat Arun, the Grand Palace, Wat Pho, and bustling Chinatown markets.

Route: The boat travels along the Chao Phraya River, offering scenic views of Bangkok's landmarks like the Grand Palace, Wat Arun (Temple of Dawn), Wat Pho (Temple of the Reclining Buddha), and more.Hop-on, Hop-off Convenience: You can get on and off the boat at any of the designated piers, allowing you to explore various attractions at your own pace.
Accessibility: Toilet: Restroom facilities are accessible for your convenience.
Accessibility: Stroller Accessible; Wheelchair not accessible
What’s included: All Day River Pass
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Please present either mobile or printed voucher for redemption at Chao Phraya Tourist Boat Counter (Every piers except Asiatique The Riverfront pier)
How to use: Please come to the pier at least 5 minutes prior to the departure time.

Terms & Conditions: Ticket is valid on the select date only. Ticket have to be used on same day after redeemed. Ticket is apply to all market including Domestic. Timetables are subject to change without prior notice. Children under 90cm are free of charge, children with the height of 90cm and over are required to purchase the ticket at the same price as adults. Ticket is no cancellation after redeemed. Price inclusive of Vat7%
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
